case_title: NICHOLAS, SUSAN, MD VS WERTZ, MICHAEL et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,988.75 FILED BY NICHOLAS, SUSAN, MD AS TO DEFENDANT WERTZ, MICHAEL WERTZ, VICTORIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NICHOLAS, SUSAN, MD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WERTZ, MICHAEL WERTZ, VICTORIA $625.00 PRINCIPAL, $42.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $667.00, PLAINTIFF DISMISSED AGAINST DEFENDANT-WERTZ, VICTORIA DUE TO DEFECTIVE CERTIFIED MAIL. CONCURRENTLY WITH PAYMENT OF THIS JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF SHALL RETURN A WELLS FARGO CHECK #218, IN THE AMOUNT OF $316.64 TO DEFENDANT. IF THE CHECK HAS BEEN CASHED BY PLAINTIFF, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS CASE SHALL BE REDUCED TO $308.50. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAIL SENT TO MICHAEL WERTZ SIGNED.
CERTIFIED MAIL SENT TO VICTORIA WERTZ RETURNED SIGNED.
